etymology.description: Śįí is a variant form of Áąĺ
etymology.interpretation: Śįí serves as an alternative form of Áąĺ(Áąĺ) (ńõr, 'you') which depicted a loom originally but was also used phonetically as 'you'. The transformation reflects a simplification and loss of original pictographic intent.
etymology.simplification: Śįí is an abridgement of Áąĺ(Áąĺ) (ńõr, 'you') and was later represented by ŚįĒ(Śįí) (ńõr, 'ear'), adopted as the simplified form of Áąĺ.
